metadata.tlp_rationale: Public release. Operator-side indicators at full fidelity; victim-identifying indicators (internal hostnames, insider AD user ID, internal IPs) redacted from this feed and held offline for victim IR coordination.
metadata.notes: Public release. Victim-identifying indicators (internal hostnames, insider Windows AD user ID, internal IPs) are redacted from this public feed and held offline for victim IR coordination. Defender intel indicators (the victim organization's own infrastructure) are flagged DO NOT BLOCK with action category MONITOR (victim).
